tagline: First national pavement maintenance franchise bringing professional recurring services to a fragmented $29B commercial property industry.
description_short: EverLine Coatings is a home-based B2B pavement maintenance franchise serving commercial property managers with line striping, sealcoating, and asphalt services on a recurring annual cycle. Operators build long-term client relationships in a $29B industry with no prior national competitor. The model supports semi-absentee ownership with low overhead and strong recurring revenue from an essential service that cannot be deferred.
market_intelligence_insight: The US pavement maintenance services market is part of a self-reported $29B industry with growing demand driven by aging infrastructure and a shift toward preventive property management. Striping revenue among top contractors surged approximately 49% year-over-year in 2025 and commercial property managers increasingly seek single-vendor solutions to reduce costs and liability exposure.
item_19_headline: 41 full-time US franchisees averaged $614,560 in gross sales in 2024
ongoing_support: franchise success manager,monthly coaching,digital marketing coordinator,EverLine University LMS,Slack channel,weekly performance meetings,regional roundtables,annual convention,vendor programs
